'''Omaha Pérez''' is an artist who illustrated ''[[Hunting the Hunters]]''. It was published in [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 6|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 6]], and later on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
